calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Lester Strouse is present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Larry Kimzey is present.
Attorney John Jue representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 505A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
